description_long: This is a full-sized axe featuring a long, slightly curved wooden handle with a dark brown finish and visible grain texture. The head of the axe is robust and metallic, painted a vivid red on the upper portion, with a sharp, silver-colored cutting edge. The blade is broad and flat, with a rectangular profile and a pronounced poll opposite the cutting edge, suitable for splitting or chopping. The handle appears ergonomically shaped for a secure grip, tapering slightly towards the end and featuring a subtle flare. The mounting of the blade to the handle is traditional, with the head fitted securely onto the handle. No visible markings, engravings, or labels are present on the axe.
description: A full-sized axe with a curved wooden handle and a red-painted metal head featuring a sharp silver blade. The design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for chopping or splitting tasks.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from an angle highlighting the curvature of the handle and the red-painted blade edge.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the length of the handle and the flatness of the blade, showing the poll and the overall robust build.
description_view_2: The blade's width and the ergonomic curve of the handle are most visible, with the red paint on the head standing out.
description_view_3: The sharpness of the blade and the secure mounting of the head to the handle are prominent, with the handle's end flaring slightly.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a smooth, ergonomic grip and slightly flared end; oval cross-section.
attribute_blade_design: Broad, flat, single-edged blade with a rectangular profile, sharp silver edge, and pronounced poll; red-painted upper surface.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the blade fitted onto the handle.
